THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HEM, JENNY MOUHCINE, ABDEL SUED AS DOE 1 THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 965 SUTTER STREET #217, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, STAYED UNTIL AUG-15-1995, LEASE FORFEITED, IF DEFTS VACATE TIMELY, PLTF WILL WAIVE ANY PAST DUE RENT, ATNYS FEES & COSTS. IF NOT, PLTF MAY FILE AMENDED MONETARY JUDGMNT BY EX-PARTE APPLICATION WITH DECLARATION. SEE WRITTEN STIPULATION FOR ADDITIONAL CONDITIONS & STATEMENTS.
